steps.title: Use negative effect values
steps.content: The passage defines negative effect values as harmful, so the answer must identify two neighboring species with negative values in the table.

steps.title: Select the harmful pair
steps.content: The table shows leafy spurge and prickly pear have negative effects. A, C, and D each include Canadian wood betony or sticky catchfly, which do not supply the needed pair of negative values. The answer is B.
